# jupiterone_control_test (Resource)

A control test containing a J1QL query that evaluates control compliance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jupiterone_control" "example" {
  name  = "Role-Based Access Control Implementation"
  owner = "security-team@example.com"
  state = "LIVE"
}

resource "jupiterone_control_test" "example" {
  name        = "RBAC Coverage Test"
  control_id  = jupiterone_control.example.id
  description = "Verifies that all users have role assignments"
  query       = "FIND User THAT HAS Role"
  results_are = "GOOD"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `control_id` (String) The ID of the control this test belongs to
- `name` (String) The name of the control test
- `query` (String) The J1QL query to evaluate
- `results_are` (String) Whether query results indicate GOOD or BAD compliance

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the control test

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
